title: lithops pseudotruncatella subsp. volkii
intro: Lithops pseudotruncatella subsp. volkii, commonly known as a type of living stone, is a small, succulent plant that belongs to the genus Lithops and is native to South Africa. This plant has been found to have various health benefits, including its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its antioxidant properties that may aid in protecting against cell damage. The therapeutic actions of Lithops pseudotruncatella subsp. volkii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in treating wounds and infections. However, I couldn't find specific information on the bioactive constituents of this plant.
